top3.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE monthly_inventory(product_id, mth, beginning_qty, sales_qty, ending_qty, min_qty) AS (
  -- Base case: December 2018 inventory levels
  SELECT 
    i.product_id,
    '2018-12' AS mth,
    SUM(i.qty) AS beginning_qty,
    0 AS sales_qty,
    SUM(i.qty) AS ending_qty,
    COALESCE(pm.qty_minimum, 0) AS min_qty
  FROM inventory i
  JOIN product_minimums pm ON i.product_id = pm.product_id
  GROUP BY i.product_id, pm.qty_minimum
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Recursive case: monthly inventory ...

WITH RECURSIVE monthly_inventory(product_id, mth, ending_inventory, min_required) AS (
    -- Base case: December 2018 inventory levels
    SELECT 
        i.product_id,
        '2018-12-01' AS mth,
        SUM(i.qty) AS ending_inventory,
        COALESCE(pm.qty_minimum, 0) AS min_required
    FROM inventory i
    JOIN product_minimums pm ON i.product_id = pm.product_id
    WHERE i.id IS NOT NULL  -- Ensure we have actual inventory records
    GROUP BY i.product_id, pm.qty_minimum
    UNION ALL
...

WITH RECURSIVE monthly_inventory(product_id, mth, beginning_qty, sales_qty, ending_qty, min_qty) AS (
  -- Base case: December 2018 inventory levels
  SELECT 
    i.product_id,
    '2018-12' AS mth,
    SUM(i.qty) AS beginning_qty,
    0 AS sales_qty,
    SUM(i.qty) AS ending_qty,
    COALESCE(pm.qty_minimum, 0) AS min_qty
  FROM inventory i
  JOIN product_minimums pm ON i.product_id = pm.product_id
  GROUP BY i.product_id, pm.qty_minimum
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Recursive case: monthly inventory ...
